title: 10 best herbal essential oils for baldness
description: Valeriana officinalis, also known as valerian, essential oils helps with baldness because it improves blood flow to the scalp, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth. The oil contains valerenic acid, which has been shown to stimulate hair follicles, reducing the risk of hair loss. Additionally, valerian root oil has anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe an itchy scalp and reduce stress, a common contributor to baldness.
